qa_pairs.question: What types of storage resources are displayed for each subsystem?
qa_pairs.answer: Each subsystem will only show the specific storage resources, such as /project or /nearline, that are available for that particular subsystem.

qa_pairs.question: How should I request both CPU and /project storage resources for the Rorqual cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: If you want to request both CPU resources and /project storage resources on the Rorqual cluster, you will have to fill in two separate requests: one with the rorqual-compute subsystem for core years and memory, and another one with the rorqual-storage subsystem for /project storage (in TB).

qa_pairs.question: What details are required when requesting CPU resources via the rorqual-compute subsystem?
qa_pairs.answer: When requesting CPU resources through the rorqual-compute subsystem, you need to specify core years and memory.

qa_pairs.question: What unit is used for requesting /project storage through the rorqual-storage subsystem?
qa_pairs.answer: /Project storage is requested in TB (terabytes) when using the rorqual-storage subsystem.

qa_pairs.question: Can I submit a single request for both CPU and /project storage resources on the Rorqual cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: No, if you want to request both CPU resources and /project storage resources on the Rorqual cluster, you will have to fill in two separate requests.
